_about: Informational baseline for the KEYED nightly live blind judges (.github/workflows/live-judge.yml). NEVER blocks a PR — the offline eval/quality_gate.py is the hard CI bar. `prior` is the previous loop's measured live score (on the original 6 cases, Vertex); `target` is this Output-Quality loop's goal that the nightly run on the held-out eval split tracks toward. Author and judge share a provider model (partial self-grading) — the per-point rubric grounding mitigates this and the offline gate is judge-independent. Backfill measured values here after a keyed run.

structures_at_risk_overall_out_of_10.note: WS-4 retrieved real-anatomy plate should raise this when a figure corpus is configured
